title: Crispy Deglazed Argentinian Broad Beans Stir-fry
description: A pungent and light solo-dinner argentinian dish featuring broad beans, deglazed with a touch of acidity for an anti-inflammatory-friendly twist in an individual-mini-cocotte.

ingredients.name: Salt and black pepper to taste

instructions: Rinse the broad beans and soak them in water for at least 6 hours or overnight.
Drain the beans, pick out any debris, and rinse thoroughly. Add back to soaking water if possible.
In a large skillet over medium heat, add olive oil. Sauté onions until soft and translucent.
Add garlic and bell pepper; cook for another minute.
Add the drained broad beans and red chili (if using). Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Pour in white wine or vermouth and lemon juice. Let it reduce, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the skillet.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve hot in individual-mini-cocottes if available.
